matches.title: 1. Check out your matches
matches.description: You will be notified by email when you and another user like each other.

schedule.title: 2. Schedule your date
schedule.description: Provide as many available days and times as possible. You may also choose to share your phone number. If you do, it will be revealed one hour before the date.

details.title: 3. Receive your date details
details.description: We will send you the final venue and time for your date.

reschedule.title: 4. Need to reschedule?
reschedule.description: If you cannot attend, you may reschedule your date. Each user has up to two rescheduling opportunities.

feedback.title: 5. Share your feedback
feedback.description: After your date, we ask that you send us a short review and let us know how it went.

noGhosting.title: 6. No ghosting policy
noGhosting.description: If you ghost a date without rescheduling, you will be removed from the platform.
